    Interpolation Master File

    Data
    Random data points: 0
    Seed: 0.55
    Method
    \(k\) = 2
    \(d\) = 4
    Cutting plane: 2
    \(L\) = 1.90

    Not interpolable! All \(Q_{i,j}\) must be nonnegative, but cocoercivity for
    \((i,j)\) =

    Gradients
    \(g_1\) = -1.30
    \(g_2\) = -0.10
    \(g_3\) = 2.00
